name: @uvibe/desktop
description: Unity Vibe Studio — chat-first desktop app for AI-assisted Unity work.

scripts.bundle: node scripts/bundle-uvibe.mjs && node scripts/fetch-node-sidecar.mjs && node scripts/fetch-whisper.mjs

//tauri-build: Package with: `pnpm --filter @uvibe/desktop bundle` (bundles uvibe.cjs + fetches the host Node sidecar + vendors the offline dictation model) then `pnpm --filter @uvibe/desktop tauri build -- --config src-tauri/tauri.bundle.conf.json`. In CI, run fetch-node-sidecar.mjs once per --target before each matrix build; fetch-whisper.mjs is host-agnostic and only needs to run once.
